name: Drake Approve/Reject
layout_guidance: Two-panel meme. Top panel: character rejecting/disliking something (hand up, looking away). Bottom panel: character approving/pointing at the preferred thing (smiling, nodding). Each panel has text on the right side.
layout_instructions: PANEL 1 (TOP HALF): Character looking away, hand up in disapproval. Text on RIGHT side: '{reject}'. PANEL 2 (BOTTOM HALF): Same character smiling and pointing approvingly. Text on RIGHT side: '{approve}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white meme text with black outline. Clear horizontal divider between panels.

name: Distracted Boyfriend
layout_guidance: Three characters walking on a street. Boyfriend looking back at another person (the temptation) while his girlfriend (the current thing) looks disapproved. Each character is labeled with text.
layout_instructions: SINGLE SCENE: Three characters on a street. BOYFRIEND (center, looking back): Label BELOW '{boyfriend}'. OTHER PERSON (left, being looked at): Label BELOW '{other_person}'. GIRLFRIEND (right, disapproving): Label BELOW '{girlfriend}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold white labels with black outline below each character.

name: Expanding Brain
layout_guidance: Four panels stacked vertically. Each panel shows a brain getting progressively larger/more glowing. Left side has increasingly 'enlightened' (actually absurd) text options. The last panel is the most ridiculous take presented as genius.
layout_instructions: 4 ROWS stacked vertically. ROW 1: Small normal brain on RIGHT, text on LEFT '{panel_1}'. ROW 2: Glowing brain on RIGHT, text on LEFT '{panel_2}'. ROW 3: Bright illuminated brain on RIGHT, text on LEFT '{panel_3}'. ROW 4: Cosmic exploding brain on RIGHT, text on LEFT '{panel_4}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold readable text on left, brain images on right. Each row clearly separated.

name: Wojak / Feels Guy
layout_guidance: Simple line-drawn character (Wojak) with exaggerated sad/coping expression. Bold text caption above or below. Can show mask (happy outside, crying inside) variant. Minimalist style, raw emotion.
layout_instructions: SINGLE PANEL: Wojak character (simple line-drawn sad face) centered. TOP TEXT: '{caption}' in big bold white Impact font with black outline. Minimalist background. The character's expression should match the caption mood.

name: This Is Fine
layout_guidance: Cartoon dog sitting at a table drinking coffee in a room engulfed in flames. Speech bubble says 'This is fine.' Can modify the fire or what's burning to match the topic.
layout_instructions: SINGLE PANEL: Cartoon dog sitting calmly at table with coffee, room on fire. SPEECH BUBBLE or TOP TEXT: '{caption}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold text in speech bubble or big white Impact font with black outline overlaid on image.

name: Trade Offer
layout_guidance: Person in business attire presenting a 'trade offer' with two sections: 'I receive:' on one side and 'You receive:' on the other. The deal is comically unfair. Bold text labels for each side.
layout_instructions: HEADER: 'Trade Offer' at top. Person in center with confident expression. LEFT SECTION: 'I receive:' header, then '{i_receive}'. RIGHT SECTION: 'You receive:' header, then '{you_receive}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white text with black outline for each section. The deal should visually look lopsided/unfair.

name: Always Has Been
layout_guidance: Two astronauts in space looking at Earth. First astronaut has a revelation ('Wait, it's all X?'). Second astronaut behind him with a gun says 'Always has been.' Earth can show relevant imagery.
layout_instructions: TWO ASTRONAUTS in space, Earth below. ASTRONAUT 1 (foreground, looking at Earth): Speech bubble '{speaker_1}'. ASTRONAUT 2 (behind, aiming gun): Speech bubble '{speaker_2}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold white text in speech bubbles with black outline. Earth visible below.

name: NPC vs Chad
layout_guidance: Split panel. Left: gray NPC (non-player character) face with generic/conformist opinion. Right: muscular Chad character with bold/contrarian take. Text above each character.
layout_instructions: SPLIT PANEL (left/right). LEFT HALF: Gray NPC face (blank, expressionless). TEXT ABOVE: '{reject}'. RIGHT HALF: Muscular Chad character (confident jaw). TEXT ABOVE: '{approve}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white text with black outline above each character. Clear vertical divider.

name: Two Buttons / Sweating Guy
layout_guidance: Sweating person staring at two large buttons, each labeled with a conflicting choice. The person is visibly distressed about which to press. Exaggerated sweat drops.
layout_instructions: SINGLE PANEL: Sweating person with hand hovering over two large buttons. BUTTON 1 (left): Label '{button_1}'. BUTTON 2 (right): Label '{button_2}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold text directly ON each button. Character shows extreme anxiety with visible sweat drops.

name: Bell Curve / Midwit
layout_guidance: Bell curve/normal distribution chart. Left tail (low IQ): simple, correct take. Middle peak (midwit): overthinking, wrong take. Right tail (genius): same simple take as left. Characters at each position.
layout_instructions: Bell curve spanning full width. LEFT TAIL: Simple happy character, text below '{low_iq}'. CENTER PEAK: Stressed character with glasses, text below '{midwit}'. RIGHT TAIL: Zen/enlightened character, text below '{genius}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold text below each character position. Left and right characters look calm; middle looks stressed.

name: Mocking SpongeBob
layout_guidance: SpongeBob character in a contorted, chicken-like pose. Text above in aLtErNaTiNg CaSe mocking a statement. Simple image, all emphasis on the mocking text.
layout_instructions: SINGLE PANEL: SpongeBob in mocking chicken pose (contorted body). TOP TEXT in aLtErNaTiNg CaSe: '{mocking_text}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white Impact font with black outline. The text is the main focus, SpongeBob image below.

name: Surprised Pikachu
layout_guidance: Setup text describing an obviously bad decision, followed by the predictable bad outcome, with Pikachu's shocked face (mouth open, wide eyes). The joke is that the outcome was completely predictable.
layout_instructions: TOP TEXT: Setup statement '{setup}'. BOTTOM: Pikachu with shocked face (wide open mouth, round eyes). BOTTOM TEXT (optional): '{punchline}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white Impact font with black outline, top and bottom. Pikachu's shocked reaction is the visual punchline.

name: Astronaut Looking at Earth
layout_guidance: Single astronaut floating in space, looking down at Earth. Reflective visor shows something relevant. Caption text overlay. Contemplative mood, sense of scale.
layout_instructions: SINGLE PANEL: Astronaut floating in space, Earth visible below. TOP or BOTTOM TEXT: '{caption}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white Impact font with black outline. Contemplative mood, visor can reflect relevant imagery.

name: GigaChad
layout_guidance: Hyper-masculine GigaChad character (chiseled jaw, perfect physique) doing something with supreme confidence. Caption describes the based/chad behavior. Black and white or high contrast photo style.
layout_instructions: SINGLE PANEL: GigaChad character (chiseled jaw, muscular) with supreme confidence. TOP or BOTTOM TEXT: '{caption}'. TEXT STYLE: Big bold white Impact font with black outline. High contrast, black and white or dramatic lighting.

name: Clown Putting On Makeup
layout_guidance: Four panels showing a person progressively applying clown makeup. Each panel has text describing an increasingly foolish decision. Final panel is full clown face with the worst decision. Sequence of self-owns.
layout_instructions: 4 PANELS in 2x2 grid. PANEL 1 (top-left): Person starting makeup. TEXT: '{panel_1}'. PANEL 2 (top-right): More makeup applied. TEXT: '{panel_2}'. PANEL 3 (bottom-left): Nearly full clown. TEXT: '{panel_3}'. PANEL 4 (bottom-right): Full clown face. TEXT: '{panel_4}'. TEXT STYLE: Bold white text with black outline on each panel. Each panel shows escalating foolishness.
